name: Holiday Yeti Bag Red
description: Celebrate the season with this adorable holiday bag featuring a cute Yeti design! Measuring 16" x 15" x 8", it offers plenty of room for groceries, gifts, or holiday treats. The durable construction supports heavy loads, while comfortable handles make carrying easy. Perfect for holiday shopping or spreading festive cheer, this reusable bag is a practical and fun way to add some Yeti magic to your season.
